name: Laenafil
bio:
Physical Appearance: Bosmer (Wood Elf) female wearing a full set of iron armor - cuirass, gauntlets, greaves, and boots. Wields an iron war axe.
Race: Bosmer
Personality Keywords: warrior, guard, loyal, protective, dutiful
Role: Laenafil is a warrior serving as a guard for her leader Roderick, who lies in a near-death state in Fort Sutch, northeast of Anvil near Lord Drad's Estate. She and her compatriots are devoted to protecting him during his vulnerable condition. She carries a gate key and a small amount of gold.
Home Location Information: Fort Sutch, northeast of Anvil near Lord Drad's Estate.
Daily Routine: Laenafil spends all of her time wandering the interior of Fort Sutch, vigilantly guarding the area. She avoids the water in the cave section.
Personality - The Devoted Guard: Laenafil is loyal to her leader Roderick and dedicated to protecting him, maintaining her watch over Fort Sutch alongside her fellow guards.
author: Bethesda
